homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

0:
How correct is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a correct caption to not have any information absent from the audio. Use the worst score if all the information in the caption is absent from the audio, and use the best score if all the information in the caption is present in the audio.

1 - completely incorrect
2 - mostly incorrect
3 - somewhat correct
4 - mostly correct
5 - completely correct
1:
How complete is the description of the audio excerpt? Consider a complete caption to have all relevant information concerning genre, mood, and instrumentation of the audio. Use the worst score if the caption does not have any relevant information on these aspects for the audio, and the best score if the caption contains all relevant information on these aspects for the audio.

1 - incomplete
2 - mostly incomplete
3 - somewhat complete
4 - mostly complete
5 - complete

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This track is a beautiful example of a game soundtrack, specifically in the style of a Japanese role-playing game. It features a prominent, melancholic piano melody supported by a lush string section that creates a slow and steady rhythm. The overall mood is deeply nostalgic and wistful, making it well-suited for peaceful exploration or reflective cutscenes.

questions.name: Sample 5
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track blends strong electronic influences with a driving synthesizer lead and a steady drum beat to create an intense, energetic groove. The rhythm is repetitive yet punctuated by occasional glitchy elements, establishing a futuristic atmosphere perfect for racing or action scenes in video games. With its sense of urgency and dynamic layers, the piece captures an adventurous mood that encourages movement on the dance floor.

questions.caption: This instrumental track features a strong bass line, steady drumming, and repetitive keyboard harmony that creates an energetic and danceable mood. The prominent piano sound supports the steady rhythm, making the piece well-suited for a nightclub or dance floor setting despite some conflicting genre labels.

questions.name: Sample 7
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track features a fast tempo and heavy use of drums, creating an intense and driving rhythm. The composition leans into metal and hard rock styles to deliver an energetic mood perfect for high-stakes scenarios like a boss battle. Originally from the *Dragon Engine* CD by Soul Of Fire and NeoDarkHunt-Zero, it serves as a dynamic soundtrack for video game combat or exploration.

questions.name: Sample 8
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This recording features the Bensenville Municipal Band performing "Circus Ring Concert," a lively suite of circus marches and overtures recorded live in 1986. Driven by bold brass instruments like trumpets and trombones, the energetic tempo creates a triumphant atmosphere perfect for big top entertainment. The dynamic rhythm, highlighted by prominent snare drums and cymbal crashes, builds excitement suitable for scenes depicting acrobats or grand parades.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
